heading: Annual survey
label: 1290 Annual survey
text: The Administrator shall annually make a survey to determine the efficiency of the operation and maintenance of treatment works constructed with grants made under this chapter, as compared to the efficiency planned at the time the grant was made. The results of such annual survey shall be included in the report required under .section 1375(a) of this title
notes: Amendments2002— repealed . See 1998 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 107–303Pub.
